notes: Case 2002-27 (Nichols v. James River) appears in the PCA official roster as a missing case from docket year 2002, but no docket entry or decision text was found in the GA 30 (2002) candidate pages. The official SJC case list in GA 30 2002 minutes (pp. 110) lists only cases 02-1, 02-2, 02-3. The Nichols cases were consolidated as 2001-34/2002-02/2002-03 with decision at ga33_2005:p74. Case 2002-27 may be an erroneous case number assignment.
